_readme: This file intentionally ships with empty url/sha256 placeholders.
scripts/fetch-tor-binaries.js refuses to download anything until a
maintainer fills them in - it will not silently skip verification.
How to fill this in safely:
1. Go to https://www.torproject.org/download/tor/ and find the current
'Tor Expert Bundle' release for each platform.
2. Verify the release against the Tor Project's PGP signature per
do not skip this; a sha256 alone only proves the file wasn't
corrupted in transit, not that it's the real Tor Project release.
3. Only after verifying the signature yourself, paste the resulting
sha256 (of the exact file at that url) into the matching entry below.
4. Bump 'version' to match the release you verified.
This groundwork exists because this project's own dev sandbox has no
network access to dist.torproject.org (confirmed blocked by egress
policy) - a maintainer with real network access has to do the above by
hand at least once. See docs/ROADMAP.md.
